ssl_certificate_provider.notes: ACM handles provisioning and renewal. Azure equivalent: App Service Managed Certificates or Key Vault certificates.

ssl_certificate_count.notes: Single wildcard certificate covers all sites
ssl_certificate_count.basis: confirmed by user: wildcard cert, ACM handles it

ssl_wildcard_in_use.notes: Wildcard cert covers all Sitecore domains across 20 CloudFront distributions

ssl_termination_point.notes: Dual termination: CloudFront edge + ALB re-encrypt to origin. Azure equivalent: Front Door edge + App Gateway or App Service.
ssl_termination_point.basis: confirmed by user: 'terminates at cloudfront and ALB both'

ssl_minimum_tls_version.basis: inferred from Sitecore 10.4, confirmed by user review

ssl_auto_renewal.notes: ACM auto-renews. Azure equivalent: App Service Managed Certificates auto-renew, or Key Vault with DigiCert/GlobalSign.

ssl_acm_validation_method.notes: Standard for ACM with Route 53. Azure equivalent: CNAME validation for App Service certs.
ssl_acm_validation_method.basis: domain knowledge: DNS validation is default and recommended for ACM with Route 53
